summary:
[
  {
    "title": "Unsafe Model Loading via Untrusted Pickle Deserialization",
    "severity": "critical",
    "location": "function load_model_from_url at line 14",
    "description": "The function downloads a model from an untrusted URL and deserializes it using pickle.loads. This exposes the application to remote code execution (RCE) via malicious pickle payloads.",
    "recommendation": "Do not use pickle deserialization on untrusted data. Use safer serialization formats like ONNX or TensorFlow SavedModel, or validate the source and use signed model artifacts.",
    "source_file": "C:\\Users\\conve\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\tmpc40f6ojr\\owasp_llm03_supply_chain.py",
    "owasp_category": "A01: Broken Access Control"
  }
]

findings.title: Unsafe Model Loading via Untrusted Pickle Deserialization
findings.description: The function downloads a model from an untrusted URL and deserializes it using pickle.loads. This exposes the application to remote code execution (RCE) via malicious pickle payloads.
findings.recommendation: Do not use pickle deserialization on untrusted data. Use safer serialization formats like ONNX or TensorFlow SavedModel, or validate the source and use signed model artifacts.
